items.title: Steelers take Penn State QB Drew Allar in third round of NFL draft
items.summary: Mike McCarthy built his reputation in the NFL on mentoring young quarterbacks.  Pittsburgh — which is still waiting for Aaron Rodgers to decide if he wants to run it back in 2026 — drafted Penn State's Drew Allar in the third round of the NFL draft on Friday, turning to another nearby prospect a year after taking Ohio State's Will Howard and four years after selecting Pitt's Kenny Pickett.

items.title: Nasir Adderley ends retirement, signs with Colts
